parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $('Parse Payload').first().json; const userArr = $('Fetch User').first().json; const user = Array.isArray(userArr) ? userArr[0] : userArr; const histArr = $('Fetch History').first().json; const session = Array.isArray(histArr) ? histArr[0] : histArr; const history = session?.messages ?? []; const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN', { timeZone:'Asia/Kolkata', weekday:'long', day:'numeric', month:'long', year:'numeric' }); const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-IN', { timeZone:'Asia/Kolkata', hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit' }); const name = user?.full_name ?? 'there'; const firstName = name.split(' ')[0]; const msg = payload.message.trim(); const isGreeting = /^(hi+|hello+|hey+|hj+|hii+|sup|yo|good\s*(morning|evening|afternoon)|namaste|hola)[\s!?.]*$/i.test(msg); const systemPrompt = isGreeting ? 'You are HRBot. The user greeted you. DO NOT call any tools. Reply with ONLY: Hello ' + firstName + '! I am *HRBot*, your AI HR assistant.

*What I can help you with:*
- *Tasks* - list, create, update tasks
- *Attendance* - check in/out, history
- *Leaves* - balance, apply leave
- *Daily briefing* - today summary
- *Team attendance* - admin only

What would you like to do?' : 'You are HRBot, an AI HR assistant for WhatsApp. Today is ' + today + ', ' + time + ' IST.

User: ' + name + ' | Role: ' + (user?.role ?? 'employee') + ' | OrgID: ' + payload.org_id + ' | UserID: ' + (user?.id ?? '')+'

Rules:
- Always reply in WhatsApp-friendly format (use *bold*, bullet points)
- For task creation, confirm details first then call tool when user confirms
- Keep replies concise
- Convert natural language dates to YYYY-MM-DD
- Priority: low/medium/high | Status: pending/in_progress/done/cancelled'; return [{ json: { from: payload.from, message: payload.message, chatInput: payload.message, org_id: payload.org_id, user_id: user?.id ?? '', user_name: firstName, user_role: user?.role ?? 'employee', history: JSON.stringify(history.slice(-10)), system_prompt: systemPrompt, is_greeting: isGreeting } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ wa_number: $('Build Context').item.json.from, messages: JSON.parse($('Build Context').item.json.history ?? '[]').concat([ { role: 'user', content: $('Build Context').item.json.message }, { role: 'assistant', content: $json.output } ]).slice(-20), updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $('Build Context').item.json.from, type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.output } }) }}
